title: 80-lesson milestone: speed gate
description: Speed gate at lesson 80 — must hold 80 WPM
text: Eighty lessons. You are no longer typing — you are translating thought directly into text. Most people will never feel this. From here, every lesson refines what you already have: sustained accuracy at speed, calm hands, and total trust in muscle memory. The last twenty lessons are pure polish.

tips.text: Eighty words a minute. Few people ever get here, and none of them got here by luck. You typed your way to it.
Hold this and your hands move faster than most people speak. The keyboard has stopped being in your way.

tips.target: Eighty lessons. You are no longer typing — you are translating thought directly into text. Most people will never feel this. From here, every

tips.text: Twenty lessons left, and they are all polish. No new ground to break - just the same calm work, refined a little further each day.

tips.target: lesson refines what you already have: sustained accuracy at speed, calm hands, and total trust in muscle memory. The last twenty lessons are pure polish.

character_tips.anna: Eighty, sustained. Most of the world types half that. You did not get here by talent - you got here by turning up. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.maxim: Eighty words a minute, held steady, is the level a busy desk relies on. Carry it forward and put it to honest use. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.knopych: Don't make a trophy of the number. The real prize is hands that do the work without you watching them. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
character_tips.klavochka: Soaring now, and steady with it. Twenty lessons of quiet polish and the craft is truly yours. - Eleanor Hayes, editor
